technology.title: ‘It does feel like an intimidation campaign’: why is US tech giant Palantir suing a small Swiss magazine?
technology.summary: An investigation by journalists working with Republik magazine may have struck a nerve by suggesting the company has failed in Switzerland It was over beers on an autumn evening in Zurich in 2024 that a group of journalists with an independent Swiss research collective began to discuss investigating Palantir, one of the world’s biggest tech companies. Three years earlier, Palantir had advertised that it was setting up a “European hub” in the Swiss municipality of Altendorf, a sleepy town of roughly 7,000 people on the shores of Lake Zurich. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: An investigation by journalists working with Republik magazine may have struck a nerve by suggesting the company has failed in Switzerland It was over beers on an autumn evening in Zurich in 2024 that a group of journalists with an independent Swiss research collective began to discuss investigating Palantir, one of the world’s biggest tech companies. Three years earlier, Palantir had advertised that it was setting up a “European hub” in the Swiss municipality of Altendorf, a sleepy town of roughly 7,000 people on the shores of Lake Zurich. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國科技巨頭Palantir對瑞士小型雜誌Republik提起訴訟，原因是該雜誌的調查報導暗示Palantir在瑞士的業務表現不佳，這引發了對該公司的質疑與爭議。
briefing.background: Palantir成立於2003年，專注於數據分析和軟體開發，並在全球範圍內提供服務。2019年，Palantir宣布在瑞士建立歐洲中心，期望擴展其在歐洲的市場。然而，隨著時間推移，該公司在瑞士的業務表現受到質疑，特別是當地媒體開始進行深入調查，揭露其業務運作的透明度問題，這引發了Palantir的強烈反應。
briefing.analysis: Palantir的訴訟被視為對媒體自由的挑戰，可能會引發更廣泛的討論關於企業如何應對負面報導。對於Palantir而言，這一行動旨在保護其品牌形象及商業利益，但也可能被視為對言論自由的威脅。Republik雜誌則強調其調查的公正性，並可能因此獲得更多公眾支持，進一步促進對企業透明度的討論。此事件可能引發其他企業在面對媒體報導時的反應模式改變。

technology.title: Musk says he’s building Terafab chip plant in Austin, Texas
technology.summary: Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab plant in Austin, Texas, that will be jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX. The goal is to eventually build chips at scale for robotics, artificial intelligence, and space-based data centers for Musk's various companies. Musk has expressed concern, as have other executives, about the chip industry's ability […]

briefing.news_focus: Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab plant in Austin, Texas, that will be jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX. The goal is to eventually build chips at scale for robotics, artificial intelligence, and space-based data centers for Musk's various companies. Musk has expressed concern, as have other executives, about the chip industry's ability […]
briefing.news_focus_zh: 埃隆·馬斯克宣布計劃在德克薩斯州奧斯汀建立一座Terafab晶片工廠，該工廠將由特斯拉和SpaceX共同運營，目標是為機器人、人工智慧及太空數據中心大規模生產晶片。
briefing.background: 隨著科技的迅速發展，晶片需求持續上升，特別是在人工智慧和自動化領域。馬斯克的Terafab工廠計劃反映出對晶片供應鏈的擔憂，尤其是在全球晶片短缺的背景下。特斯拉和SpaceX的合作將使兩家公司能夠更有效地控制其晶片生產，並減少對外部供應商的依賴，這在當前的市場環境中尤為重要。
briefing.analysis: 馬斯克的計劃可能會改變晶片產業的競爭格局，特別是對於專注於AI和太空技術的公司。特斯拉和SpaceX的合作將使他們能夠針對特定需求開發專用晶片，這可能會使其他科技公司面臨更大的競爭壓力。此外，這一舉措也可能引發對於晶片製造的政策支持和資金投入的討論，特別是在美國政府推動半導體自給自足的背景下。

supporting_titles: Elon Musk misled Twitter investors while trying to get out of acquisition, jury says

technology.title: Cyberattack on a Car Breathalyzer Firm Leaves Drivers Stuck
technology.summary: Plus: The FBI admits it’s buying phone data to track Americans, Iranian hackers disrupt medical care at Maryland hospitals, and more.

briefing.news_focus: Plus: The FBI admits it’s buying phone data to track Americans, Iranian hackers disrupt medical care at Maryland hospitals, and more.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一場針對汽車呼氣測試儀公司的網路攻擊，導致許多駕駛者無法正常使用該設備，影響其駕駛權限及安全性。
briefing.background: 隨著汽車科技的進步，呼氣測試儀成為確保酒駕防治的重要工具。這些設備通常與車輛的啟動系統連結，若遭受網路攻擊，將直接影響駕駛者的日常生活。近年來，網路攻擊事件頻繁，特別是針對關鍵基礎設施及醫療系統，顯示出網路安全的重要性與脆弱性。
briefing.analysis: 此次攻擊對於汽車呼氣測試儀公司及其用戶造成直接影響，駕駛者可能面臨無法啟動車輛的困境。該事件可能引發對網路安全的更大關注，促使相關企業加強防護措施。此外，FBI購買手機數據的行為也可能引發隱私權的討論，進一步影響公眾對政府監控的信任度。各方可能在未來對網路安全與個人隱私的平衡展開激烈辯論。

politics.title: Israel says investigating whether own soldiers shot civilian on Lebanon border
politics.summary: Israel’s military said it was investigating whether its own fire killed an Israeli civilian near the Lebanese border on Sunday, after Hezbollah claimed an attack in the same area. Israeli emergency workers said earlier on Sunday that a man was killed in a “direct hit” on his car by a rocket from Lebanon. Lebanon’s Iran-backed Hezbollah militant group said after the incident that its fighters had attacked Israeli soldiers in the same area. But the Israeli army later said it was “conducting a...

briefing.news_focus: Israel’s military said it was investigating whether its own fire killed an Israeli civilian near the Lebanese border on Sunday, after Hezbollah claimed an attack in the same area. Israeli emergency workers said earlier on Sunday that a man was killed in a “direct hit” on his car by a rocket from Lebanon. Lebanon’s Iran-backed Hezbollah militant group said after the incident that its fighters had attacked Israeli soldiers in the same area. But the Israeli army later said it was “conducting a...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列軍方正在調查是否其士兵的火力導致一名以色列平民在黎巴嫩邊境被擊斃，該事件發生在真主黨宣稱在同一地區攻擊以色列士兵之後。
briefing.background: 以色列與黎巴嫩的緊張關係由來已久，特別是與真主黨的衝突。近期，兩國邊境地區的軍事活動頻繁，真主黨的攻擊行動常常引發以色列的報復。此次事件發生在這樣的背景下，並且涉及平民傷亡，可能會進一步加劇雙方的緊張局勢，影響國際社會對該地區安全的關注。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件揭示了以色列軍方在邊境衝突中的複雜性。若調查結果確認是以色列士兵誤擊平民，將對以色列政府的內部與外部形象造成負面影響，並可能引發國內對軍事行動的質疑。而真主黨則可能利用此事件加強其在黎巴嫩的支持基礎，並指責以色列的軍事行為。各方的立場差異可能導致局勢進一步升級，特別是在國際社會的壓力下。

politics.title: Philippine military uncovers alleged new Beijing spy tactics in South China Sea row
politics.summary: At least three Filipinos with ties to the country’s military have been arrested on suspicion of spying for Beijing, allegedly leaking information that sparked maritime confrontations in the disputed South China Sea. The case, which came to light last year during an ongoing multi-agency counter-intelligence effort, marks a new strategy of recruiting Filipinos for espionage instead of planting individuals with fake local identities in the country, according to Philippine Navy Rear Admiral Roy...

briefing.news_focus: At least three Filipinos with ties to the country’s military have been arrested on suspicion of spying for Beijing, allegedly leaking information that sparked maritime confrontations in the disputed South China Sea. The case, which came to light last year during an ongoing multi-agency counter-intelligence effort, marks a new strategy of recruiting Filipinos for espionage instead of planting individuals with fake local identities in the country, according to Philippine Navy Rear Admiral Roy...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 菲律賓軍方逮捕三名涉嫌為北京從事間諜活動的菲律賓人，這些人被指控洩漏信息，導致南海爭端中的海上對峙。此案件顯示出北京在招募間諜方面的新策略，改為利用本國人員而非假身份人士。
briefing.background: 南海爭端涉及多個國家，包括中國、菲律賓、越南等，這些國家對海域的主權聲索互有交錯。隨著地緣政治緊張加劇，各國在情報戰方面的活動也愈加頻繁。菲律賓軍方的反間諜行動顯示出其對國家安全的重視，並反映出中國在該地區的影響力擴張策略，特別是在招募當地人員進行間諜活動的方式上。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件突顯了中國在南海的間諜活動新策略，可能使菲律賓政府面臨更大的內部安全挑戰。對於菲律賓而言，這不僅是對國家安全的威脅，也可能影響其與美國及其他盟友的合作關係，因為美方可能會加強對菲律賓的安全支持。另一方面，中國則可能利用此事件進一步加強其在南海的軍事存在，並試圖削弱菲律賓的抵抗意志，導致地區局勢更加複雜。

supporting_titles: China could use new law against Taiwanese: MAC
Taiwan’s New Southbound 2.0: Rewiring the Indo-Pacific Beyond China

politics.title: US may ‘escalate to de-escalate’ attacks against Iran, says Scott Bessent
politics.summary: The United States may need to “escalate” its attacks against Iran to be able to wind down the war, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Sunday, after US President Donald Trump gave seemingly contradictory trajectories for the US military campaign. Trump on Saturday threatened to “obliterate” Iranian energy plants if Tehran did not fully open the pivotal Strait of Hormuz, just a day after saying US objectives were “very close” and that he was considering “winding down” the war. Asked on...

briefing.news_focus: The United States may need to “escalate” its attacks against Iran to be able to wind down the war, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Sunday, after US President Donald Trump gave seemingly contradictory trajectories for the US military campaign. Trump on Saturday threatened to “obliterate” Iranian energy plants if Tehran did not fully open the pivotal Strait of Hormuz, just a day after saying US objectives were “very close” and that he was considering “winding down” the war. Asked on...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國財政部長斯科特·貝森特表示，美國可能需要加大對伊朗的攻擊力度，以便最終能夠結束戰爭。此言論出現在特朗普總統對美國軍事行動的矛盾表述之後，特朗普威脅如果伊朗不完全開放霍爾木茲海峽，將摧毀其能源設施。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係持續升級，特別是在特朗普政府推行的制裁政策下。霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，任何對該地區的軍事行動都可能影響全球能源市場。特朗普的言論反映出其政府在應對伊朗問題上的矛盾策略，既希望透過威脅施壓達成外交目的，又又希望避免全面衝突。
briefing.analysis: 美國的軍事策略面臨內部矛盾，特朗普的強硬言辭與希望結束戰爭的意圖相互抵觸。這可能導致國內外對美國政策的質疑，特別是盟友可能擔心美國的軍事行動會引發更大範圍的衝突。伊朗則可能利用這一局勢加強其反美立場，進一步激化地區緊張局勢。未來的發展將取決於美國是否能夠在強硬與外交之間找到平衡。

supporting_titles: Iran-Israel war LIVE: Will completely close Strait of Hormuz if U.S. targets power plants, says Iran

economy.title: Gold slides as hawkish Fed and strong US dollar override geopolitical fears
economy.summary: Gold prices have continued to weaken despite escalating tensions in the US-Israel conflict with Iran, breaking from the metal’s traditional role as a geopolitical hedge, as fading expectations of interest rate cuts and a stronger US dollar weigh on sentiment, analysts said. The metal has declined about 15 per cent since a brief surge on March 2, when prices climbed to around US$5,300 per ounce following US and Israeli strikes on Iran. A modest rebound driven by technical buying on Friday did...

briefing.news_focus: Gold prices have continued to weaken despite escalating tensions in the US-Israel conflict with Iran, breaking from the metal’s traditional role as a geopolitical hedge, as fading expectations of interest rate cuts and a stronger US dollar weigh on sentiment, analysts said. The metal has declined about 15 per cent since a brief surge on March 2, when prices climbed to around US$5,300 per ounce following US and Israeli strikes on Iran. A modest rebound driven by technical buying on Friday did...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 近期金價持續下滑，儘管美國與以色列與伊朗之間的緊張局勢加劇，市場對於利率降息的預期減弱以及美元走強，對金價造成壓力，打破了金屬作為地緣政治避險工具的傳統角色。
briefing.background: 金價通常在地緣政治緊張時期上漲，作為避險資產。然而，近期美國聯邦儲備系統（Fed）表現出鷹派立場，暗示可能不會降息，並且美元強勢上升，這些因素共同影響了金價。自3月2日金價短暫上漲以來，金價已下跌約15%，顯示出市場對於金屬的需求減弱，尤其是在經濟前景不確定的情況下。
briefing.analysis: 美國聯邦儲備系統的鷹派政策使投資者對金價的信心下降，因為高利率通常會使持有黃金的機會成本上升。另一方面，美元的強勢也使得以其他貨幣計價的金價上升困難。這對於投資者、金礦公司及地緣政治風險較高的國家而言，均可能導致資本流出及市場波動，未來金價可能會繼續受到這些因素的影響。

economy.title: Starmer adviser urges ministers to look at profits cap for energy and petrol firms
economy.summary: PM’s ‘cost of living champion’ calls for consideration of temporary measure to prevent profiteering from Iran war The government’s top cost of living adviser has called on ministers to explore a temporary cap on the profits of energy and petrol companies to prevent them from cashing in excessively on the war in the Middle East. Richard Walker – a Labour peer, the chair of Iceland supermarkets and the prime minister’s “cost of living champion” – said he had asked the government to examine limiting how much businesses were able to benefit from higher energy prices after Iran’s blockade of the strait of Hormuz, a crucial shipping route for Europe’s oil and gas , and the wider conflict in the region. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: PM’s ‘cost of living champion’ calls for consideration of temporary measure to prevent profiteering from Iran war The government’s top cost of living adviser has called on ministers to explore a temporary cap on the profits of energy and petrol companies to prevent them from cashing in excessively on the war in the Middle East. Richard Walker – a Labour peer, the chair of Iceland supermarkets and the prime minister’s “cost of living champion” – said he had asked the government to examine limiting how much businesses were able to benefit from higher energy prices after Iran’s blockade of the strait of Hormuz, a crucial shipping route for Europe’s oil and gas , and the wider conflict in the region. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國政府的成本生活顧問呼籲考慮對能源和石油公司的利潤設置臨時上限，以防止這些公司在中東衝突中過度獲利，特別是在伊朗封鎖霍爾木茲海峽的背景下。
briefing.background: 隨著中東地區的緊張局勢加劇，能源價格隨之上漲，英國政府面臨民眾對生活成本上升的壓力。能源和石油公司在此情況下的高利潤引發了社會對公平與正義的討論。過去幾年，英國的能源市場經歷了多次波動，尤其是在疫情後，供應鏈問題和地緣政治因素加劇了價格的不穩定性。
briefing.analysis: 此呼籲反映了政府對民生問題的關注，但也可能引發企業界的反彈。能源公司可能會反對利潤上限，認為這會抑制投資和創新。另一方面，消費者和社會團體則可能支持此措施，認為應該防止企業在危機中獲取不當利益。若政府採取行動，可能會在短期內緩解民生壓力，但長期影響仍需觀察，包括對能源市場的投資意願及價格穩定性。

economy.title: HSBC vows to keep investing in China amid global tensions as new trade corridors emerge
economy.summary: HSBC CEO Georges Elhedery has vowed to continue investing in China amid escalating trade tensions after witnessing new trade opportunities from Chinese companies going global. While attending the two-day China Development Forum (CDF) 2026 in Beijing on Sunday, Elhedery characterised China’s current trajectory as a “new phase of development” that would define the next era of global economic growth. Although 2025 saw steady growth in global trade, the landscape was complicated by shifting tariffs,...

briefing.news_focus: HSBC CEO Georges Elhedery has vowed to continue investing in China amid escalating trade tensions after witnessing new trade opportunities from Chinese companies going global. While attending the two-day China Development Forum (CDF) 2026 in Beijing on Sunday, Elhedery characterised China’s current trajectory as a “new phase of development” that would define the next era of global economic growth. Although 2025 saw steady growth in global trade, the landscape was complicated by shifting tariffs,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 匯豐銀行首席執行官喬治·埃爾赫德里在中國發展論壇上表示，儘管全球貿易緊張局勢升級，匯豐仍將持續在中國投資，並指出中國企業的全球化為新貿易機會帶來了潛力。
briefing.background: 隨著中國經濟的持續增長和全球貿易格局的變化，中國企業正逐漸在國際市場上擴展影響力。匯豐銀行作為一家全球性金融機構，長期以來在中國市場中扮演重要角色。近年來，隨著中美貿易摩擦及其他地緣政治因素的影響，許多外資企業面臨重新評估其在中國的投資策略的挑戰。匯豐的投資承諾反映了其對中國市場潛力的信心。
briefing.analysis: 匯豐的立場顯示出其對中國市場的長期承諾，這與其他一些外資企業的謹慎態度形成對比。儘管全球貿易環境不確定性增加，匯豐仍認為中國的發展潛力將為其帶來盈利機會。此舉可能會吸引其他外資企業重新考慮其在中國的投資策略，並可能促進中國企業的國際化進程。然而，隨著貿易政策的不斷變化，匯豐也需謹慎應對潛在的風險。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體敘事主軸圍繞著科技、政治與經濟之間的相互影響與緊張局勢。在科技版面中，Palantir的訴訟與馬斯克的晶片工廠計劃反映出科技企業在面對外部挑戰及市場需求時的應對策略；而政治版面則揭示中東及南海地區的緊張局勢如何影響國際關係，特別是美國對伊朗的軍事策略與菲律賓的間諜案件。經濟方面，金價的下滑與能源企業利潤的討論顯示出地緣政治對市場的深遠影響，尤其是在霍爾木茲海峽的衝突背景下，能源價格波動將進一步影響全球經濟格局。
